SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold

Class ProximalMold

java.lang.Object
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Entity
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.ProximalMold
All Implemented Interfaces:
CanAge, CanGrow, CanPropagate, Displayable, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DividedMold1
public abstract class ProximalMold extends Mold
An abstract mold whose propagation targets are the immediate neighbours (Manhattan distance 1 or 2). Cardinal directions (distance 1) are given a weight of 8, while diagonal directions (distance 2) are given a weight of 5. The static distribution list is shared among all subclasses.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • distribution

      public static final List<CoorWeight> distribution
      The static, unmodifiable list of weighted propagation targets for all proximal molds. Sorted by weight in descending order.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProximalMold

      public ProximalMold(int initialGrowth, int growthRate, int minimumGrowth, double propagationRate, Entities entityType, double ageDeathFactor, double ageDeathMax)
      Constructs a ProximalMold with the specified growth parameters and entity type.
      Parameters:
      initialGrowth - initial growth value
      growthRate - growth increment per step
      minimumGrowth - minimum growth required for propagation
      propagationRate - base probability or factor for propagation
      entityType - the type of entity this mold represents
      ageDeathFactor - factor affecting death probability based on age
      ageDeathMax - maximum age after which death probability is capped

  • Method Details

    • getPropagationDistributionList

      public List<CoorWeight> getPropagationDistributionList()

      The list is static and shared across all instances of proximal molds.

      Returns:
      the proximal propagation distribution
